name: biobabel
description: Bio-Babel agent consumption layer for Codex — discover exact schema-v1 contracts for Bio-Babel R-to-Python bioinformatics ports and validate snippets. Bundles 12 read-only MCP tools, an R-paste detector hook, and per-package skills.

interface.shortDescription: Exact contracts for Bio-Babel R-to-Python ports, plus snippet linting
